ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry to which the occupation belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the occupation is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the occupation was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the occupation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* ID of the occupation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation group */,
  "total_unemployed" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "less_than_five_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for less than five weeks */,
  "five_to_fourteen_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for five to fourteen weeks */,
  "total_fifteen_wks_and_over" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals unemployed for fifteen weeks or more */,
  "fifteen_to_twenty_six_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for fifteen to twenty-six weeks */,
  "twenty_seven_wks_and_over" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for twenty-seven weeks or more */,
  "avg_duration_wks" REAL /* Average duration of unemployment in weeks */,
  "median_duration_wks" REAL /* Median duration of unemployment in weeks */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the given year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the given year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES occupation_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is the current year for data collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the year entry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the year entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* ID of the occupation being accessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country to which the region belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the region is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the occupation group is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the group was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the group record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* ID of the occupation */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the membership is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the membership was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the membership record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES occupation_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupation_group_memberships_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_occupation_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* ID of the occupation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the membership is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the membership was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the membership record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_occupation_memberships_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_occupation_memberships_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data_regions" (
  "region_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* ID of the occupation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "total_unemployed" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "less_than_five_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for less than five weeks */,
  "five_to_fourteen_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for five to fourteen weeks */,
  "total_fifteen_wks_and_over" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals unemployed for fifteen weeks or more */,
  "fifteen_to_twenty_six_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for fifteen to twenty-six weeks */,
  "twenty_seven_wks_and_over" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for twenty-seven weeks or more */,
  "avg_duration_wks" REAL /* Average duration of unemployment in weeks */,
  "median_duration_wks" REAL /* Median duration of unemployment in weeks */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_regions_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data_groupings" (
  "group_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation group */,
  "occupation_id" TEXT /* ID of the occupation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "total_unemployed" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "less_than_five_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for less than five weeks */,
  "five_to_fourteen_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for five to fourteen weeks */,
  "total_fifteen_wks_and_over" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals unemployed for fifteen weeks or more */,
  "fifteen_to_twenty_six_wks" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for fifteen to twenty-six weeks */,
  "twenty_seven_wks_and_over" INTEGER /* Number of individuals unemployed for twenty-seven weeks or more */,
  "avg_duration_wks" REAL /* Average duration of unemployment in weeks */,
  "median_duration_wks" REAL /* Median duration of unemployment in weeks */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate for the group */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_groupings_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES occupation_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_groupings_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the industry is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the industry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the industry record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the country is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the country was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
